title: MCP Access Request Intake
description: Schema for validating MCP, AI service and external API access requests

workflow_name.description: Name of the workflow or integration being requested

requester_name.description: Full name of the person submitting the request

team.description: Team or department responsible for the integration

service_name.description: Name of the AI service, MCP server or external API

vendor_name.description: Name of the vendor or service provider

vendor_url.description: Vendor website or service documentation URL

data_classification.description: Highest data classification this integration will access

external_exposure.description: Extent to which data leaves the internal environment

mcp_tool_scope.description: List of tools exposed by the MCP server (required for mcp_server type)

agentic_scope.description: Description of what the AI agent can do autonomously versus what requires human confirmation

business_purpose.description: Specific business justification for the integration

requested_permissions.description: Specific permissions, scopes or access levels being requested

review_period.description: Proposed access duration or expiry date

credential_storage.description: Where credentials for this integration will be stored

prior_review_reference.description: Evidence ID of a prior review if this is a re-review or scope extension
